moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The world's most prestigious tennis tournament, Wimbledon, begins on Monday, June 29, promising two weeks of thrilling grass-court action at the All England Club.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: Strawberries & cream at the ready! Wimbledon 2026 serves up its first aces tomorrow. Who are you backing for glory on the grass?

angles.name: London Focus
angles.copy: London is buzzing! The All England Club opens its gates tomorrow for Wimbledon 2026. Get set for two weeks of world-class tennis right here in the capital.

moments.title: British Grand Prix at Silverstone
moments.blurb: Formula 1 roars into Silverstone next weekend for the British Grand Prix, with practice, qualifying, and the main race from July 3-5, 2026.

angles.name: Race Build-up
angles.copy: Start your engines! The British Grand Prix is just days away. Who's taking pole position and who's got the pace for the podium at Silverstone?

angles.name: Weekend Plans
angles.copy: Planning your weekend? F1 hits Silverstone from July 3rd! Get ready for high-octane drama at the British Grand Prix.

moments.title: FIFA World Cup Round of 32
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 continues with intense Round of 32 matches taking place over the coming days, as nations battle for a spot in the last 16.

angles.name: Ongoing Matches
angles.copy: The World Cup knockout stages are heating up! Who impressed you in the Round of 32 matches so far, and who's your pick to go all the way?

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Crunch time in the World Cup! The Round of 32 continues, with every match a do-or-die battle for survival. Don't miss the action!

moments.title: BST Hyde Park Festival Underway
moments.blurb: The BST Hyde Park festival is in full swing in London, featuring major headliners like Lewis Capaldi, Pitbull, and Mumford & Sons across multiple dates until July 12.

angles.name: Current Buzz
angles.copy: Hyde Park is alive with the sound of music! BST Hyde Park is bringing huge names to London. Who have you seen or who are you excited for?

angles.name: Artist Shoutout
angles.copy: Lewis Capaldi, Pitbull, Mumford & Sons – just some of the acts lighting up BST Hyde Park! Who's your must-see at this year's festival?

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Live in Glasgow
moments.blurb: Scotland's TRNSMT Festival is happening now at Glasgow Green, with a stellar line-up including Richard Ashcroft, Wolf Alice, Nile Rodgers & CHIC, Kasabian, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Glasgow Green is rocking! TRNSMT Festival is bringing the best of music to Scotland this weekend. Who's on your must-see list?

angles.name: Scottish Music Scene
angles.copy: The biggest party in Scotland is officially underway! TRNSMT Festival is live in Glasgow with incredible acts. Tell us your favourite moment so far!

moments.title: Love Island Season 13 Continues
moments.blurb: The latest season of the popular reality dating show, Love Island, is currently airing on ITV2, with Maya Jama hosting the drama from the villa.

angles.name: Daily Buzz
angles.copy: Another day, another dose of drama from the Love Island villa! Who's coupled up and who's on the rocks tonight?

angles.name: Fan Opinion
angles.copy: The islanders are bringing the heat! What's your verdict on this season of Love Island so far? Who's your favourite?

moments.title: House of the Dragon Season 3 Airing
moments.blurb: The third season of the Game of Thrones prequel, House of the Dragon, is currently captivating viewers, delving deeper into the Targaryen civil war.

angles.name: Current Series
angles.copy: Dragons, drama, and dynastic disputes! House of the Dragon Season 3 is delivering all the Westeros action. Are you watching?

angles.name: Fan Theories
angles.copy: Who's on the Iron Throne by the end of House of the Dragon Season 3? Share your theories for the next episodes!

moments.title: Happy 58th Chayanne!
moments.blurb: Puerto Rican singer-songwriter Chayanne, known for his energetic performances and ballads, turns 58 today.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 58th Birthday to the legendary Chayanne! What's your favourite hit from the Latin pop icon?

moments.title: Happy 48th Nicole Scherzinger!
moments.blurb: Singer, dancer, and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger, known from The Pussycat Dolls, celebrates her 48th birthday on June 29.

angles.name: Birthday Wish
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 48th Birthday to the incredible Nicole Scherzinger tomorrow! What's your favourite Pussycat Dolls track or solo hit?

moments.title: Happy 73rd Colin Hay!
moments.blurb: Colin Hay, the Scottish-Australian frontman of the iconic band Men at Work, turns 73 on June 29.

angles.name: Music Legend
angles.copy: Happy 73rd Birthday to the distinctive voice of Men at Work, Colin Hay, tomorrow! What's your favourite track from the legendary frontman?

moments.title: Happy 78th Ian Paice!
moments.blurb: Ian Paice, the only continuous member and drummer of the legendary rock band Deep Purple, celebrates his 78th birthday on June 29.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we celebrate the 78th birthday of Deep Purple's drumming powerhouse, Ian Paice! What's your favourite Deep Purple classic?

moments.title: Happy 42nd Fantasia Barrino!
moments.blurb: American R&B singer and American Idol winner Fantasia Barrino turns 42 on June 30.

angles.name: Birthday Groove
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! The incredible Fantasia Barrino turns 42 on June 30. What's your favourite track from the R&B star?

moments.title: Happy 81st Debbie Harry!
moments.blurb: Debbie Harry, the iconic lead singer of new wave legends Blondie, celebrates her 81st birthday on July 1.

angles.name: Punk Rock Queen
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the one and only Debbie Harry on July 1! What's your ultimate Blondie anthem?

moments.title: Happy 55th Missy Elliott!
moments.blurb: Groundbreaking rapper, singer, songwriter, and producer Missy Elliott celebrates her 55th birthday on July 1.

angles.name: Hip Hop Royalty
angles.copy: Work It! Wishing a massive Happy 55th Birthday to the legendary Missy Elliott on July 1. What's her most iconic track for you?

moments.title: Happy 34th Burna Boy!
moments.blurb: Grammy Award-winning Nigerian singer, songwriter, and record producer Burna Boy, a leading figure in Afrobeats, turns 34 on July 2.

angles.name: Afrobeats Star
angles.copy: Big vibes for Burna Boy, who turns 34 on July 2! What's your favourite track from the African Giant?

moments.title: Monmouth Medieval Festival
moments.blurb: The Monmouth Medieval Festival takes place July 4-5, transforming the Welsh town into a vibrant celebration of medieval history with reenactments and markets.

angles.name: Local Welsh Event
angles.copy: Step back in time next weekend! The Monmouth Medieval Festival is on July 4-5, bringing knights, jesters, and medieval magic to Monmouth. Who's going?

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: Hear ye, hear ye! The Monmouth Medieval Festival is just around the corner. Get ready for a weekend of history and fun for all the family in Monmouth!
